text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, we're training in signature racewear, and
El Condor Pasa seems to be running more
energetically than usual.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Good shape, good form, peak performance! As
usual, I'm definitely the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And it's all thanks to my signature racewear!
Wearin' it gets me so pumped!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course, I don't think it's completely because of my outfit!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yep! Actually, just yesterday I sent my papa a
picture of me in my racewear!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
He said he really liked it, and then we talked all
about G1 races!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm in such a good mood! My dream's
just around the corner!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone I'm the world's strongest in my
signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her love for her racewear has really put El Condor
Pasa into a good mood.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thank you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I got my mask from my papa, but I chose my
racewear myself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: It's packed full of my ambition!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You get me, right, Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Like your determination to achieve your
dreams?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I like your passion, Trainer! That's how it
should be!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I gotta beat all of 'em! Then I can
show everyone I'm the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All of my determination is in this racewear!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've got an idea! You should try it on too, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I've got my phone ready! All righty, strike a pose!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We only got pictures of me yesterday, but you've
got dreams too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
So let's take one together! Then we can pick one
and send it to my papa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's use the sky fit for a condor as the backdrop!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
A pose that shows we're a combo would be great!
Maybe somethin' like we're holding up the sky—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I've got it! You sit on my shoulders! That'll be
great!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You'll look like the best partner around! C'mere,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I talk my way out of sitting on her shoulders, and
we send her dad a picture of the two of us
holding up the sky.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Efectiviwonder! You get it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: In that case, there's just one thing to do! Let's go!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: The name's El Condor Pasa! I'll overcome any hill!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Carrying hopes and dreams on my back, I shall
push forward! For I am El Condor Pasa, the
world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No matter how rugged the road is, El Condor
Pasa keeps moving forward!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
On this mask, I hereby make the world's strongest
oath! And into this racewear I pour my...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Fighting spirit! Conviction! And determination to
achieve my dreams!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... I gotta prove I'm the world's strongest!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer! You gotta help me become hella strong!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa keeps up that energy throughout
her training and ends up thoroughly exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yet her expression looks completely refreshed,
having renewed her determination.
